options.name: --resource-group
options.description: Resource group(s) containing resources. You can pass multiple, and used the wildcard * character.

options.name: --condensed
options.description: Condenses Private Endpoints / VNet Integration. For large deployments this can greatly simplify the diagram.

options.name: --show-inferred
options.description: Show runtime flows inferred from app-settings

options.name: --show-runtime
options.description: Show runtime flows defined on the management plane

options.name: --show-identity
options.description: Show runtime flows to managed identities

options.name: --token
options.description: Access token that can read the resources

options.name: --output-file-name
options.description: File name to write to (will use convention to determine based on a resource-group name if not provided)

options.name: --output-png
options.description: Output png file with draw.io diagram embedded
